brand_identity.name: ConstructMarket
brand_identity.description: A robust, no-nonsense procurement platform for the construction industry. The design should feel as reliable as a steel beam and as precise as a blueprint.

rules: Headings (h1-h3) must use Barlow Condensed with tracking-tight (-0.02em).
Body text must use Public Sans with distinct weights (400 for text, 500 for labels).
Uppercase labels (overline) must use Barlow Condensed, tracking-widest, font-bold.

colors.palette_description: Teal for Structure, Orange for Action, Slate for Foundation.

semantic_usage.primary: Main branding, headers, active states, borders of active inputs.
semantic_usage.accent: Critical actions (Sign Contract, Submit Bid), Notification badges.

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode B for dashboards, Mode A for marketing)
layout.spacing: Generous (2x standard). Use p-8 where p-4 is expected.
layout.container_style: Sharp edges (rounded-sm or rounded-none). 1px solid borders.
layout.glassmorphism: Use 'Technical Grid' style: solid backgrounds with visible grid lines (border-r, border-b).

components.buttons: Rectangular, sharp corners (rounded-sm). Primary: Solid Teal. Secondary: Outline Slate.
components.cards: Flat, white background, 1px border-slate-200. No shadow by default. Hover: shadow-md + border-teal-600 transition.
components.inputs: bg-slate-50, border-slate-200, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-teal-600 focus:border-transparent rounded-sm.
components.navigation: Sidebar for dashboards (slate-900 bg, white text). Top nav for marketing (white bg, sticky, border-b).
components.charts: Recharts with custom tooltip styling. Colors: Teal (Growth), Orange (Pending), Slate (Static).

asset_instructions.icons: Use 'lucide-react' with a stroke-width of 1.5px (thin) for a technical look.
asset_instructions.3d_elements: Use Spline for hero interaction if needed, but prefer high-quality photography for trust.
asset_instructions.logo_style: Simple, geometric, monochrome logos for partners.

universal_guidelines: Use distinct z-index layering (depth) rather than flat design.
Avoid 'transition: all'; animate specific properties only.
Do NOT center align the app container.
Use data-testid on ALL interactive elements.
Do not use transparent backgrounds without blur/scrim.
JS files are used (JSX syntax), not TSX.
